name: AI-Powered Hand Gesture Mouse Navigation System
description:
Architecture Overview

This system enables touchless human-computer interaction by transforming real-time video frames from a standard PC camera into system-level mouse events. The architecture utilizes a Computer Vision (CV) pipeline to detect hand landmarks and a Logic Engine to map those landmarks to screen coordinates and click actions.

Key Components:

  • Frame Capture & Pre-processing: Normalizes raw video data for high-performance processing.
  • Landmark Detection: Typically powered by MediaPipe or OpenCV, identifying 21 distinct hand points.
  • Coordinate Mapping: Translates hand movement within the camera's FOV to the screen resolution.
  • Signal Smoothing: Uses Kalman Filters or Weighted Moving Averages to prevent 'shaky' cursor movement.
  • Input Simulation: Leverages OS-level APIs to inject mouse events into the system event queue.
code:
graph TD
  subgraph sgInput [Input Layer]
    Camera[PC WebCam] --> Capture[Frame Capture Engine]
    Capture --> PreProc[Image Pre-processing & Normalization]
  end

  subgraph sgCV [Computer Vision Pipeline]
    PreProc --> LandmarkDet[Hand Landmark Detection - MediaPipe/OpenCV]
    LandmarkDet --> FeatureEx[Feature Extraction - Landmark Coordinates]
  end

  subgraph sgLogic [Gesture Interpretation Engine]
    FeatureEx --> CoordMap[Coordinate Scaling - FOV to Resolution]
    CoordMap --> Stabilizer[Signal Smoothing Filter - Kalman/Moving Avg]
    Stabilizer --> GestureRec[Gesture Pattern Recognition Logic]
  end

  subgraph sgSystem [OS Integration Layer]
    GestureRec --> ActionTrigger[Action Dispatcher]
    ActionTrigger --> Driver[Input Simulation API - e.g. PyAutoGUI/Quartz]
    Driver --> OS[OS Event Queue]
    OS --> Cursor[System Mouse/Pointer Movement]
  end

  GestureRec --> Feedback[Visual HUD Overlay]

  style sgInput fill:transparent,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
  style sgCV fill:transparent,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
  style sgLogic fill:transparent,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
  style sgSystem fill:transparent,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
  
  classDef component fill:#f8fafc,stroke:#334155,stroke-width:2px,color:#000
  class Camera,Capture,PreProc,LandmarkDet,FeatureEx,CoordMap,Stabilizer,GestureRec,ActionTrigger,Driver,OS,Cursor,Feedback component
